creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: @Graham, I suggest you -C at least qt5-* and kf5-solid and kf5-ki18n in a new poudriere run, to clean out older packages that may still record dependencies on the no-longer-existing qt5-qml. Your latest pkg rquery %do shows that qt5-qml (weirdly) depends only on a handful of packages, whereas if it were a "real" qt5-qml it would depend on a bunch of Qt packages as well. So clean that one out too.
